catalog_content:
Item Name: NOW Buttermilk Powder - 14 Oz. (Pack of 6)
Bullet Point 1: Pure. Natural. Real.
Bullet Point 2: Excellent Leavening Agent
Bullet Point 3: Low in Fat
Bullet Point 4: Excellent Source of Protein and Calcium
Bullet Point 5: Mixes Easily for Rich Creamy Taste
Product Description: Most professional bakers will tell you that buttermilk is a necessity for any kitchen. It’s acidic and reacts with alkaline baking soda to create carbon dioxide bubbles, which gives baked goods that signature light and fluffy texture. NOW Real Food Buttermilk Powder is superior to the liquid form since it has a long shelf life and doesn’t require refrigeration. Buttermilk is an excellent source of protein and calcium.
Value: 84.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Positioned as a functional baking ingredient with a natural, no-preservative appeal. The pack-of-6 bundle deal suggests a value-oriented purchase for bakers or households requiring frequent use. Labels like 'low in fat,' 'excellent protein source,' and 'long shelf life' target health-conscious and convenience-driven consumers, though no premium branding or certifications are present to justify a higher price point.

Place 1 teaspoon of tea for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Strain and pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teaspoons of tea into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. Strain and pour the tea into the serving pitcher Add ice and top-up with cold water.
